_comment: Source: Screenshot_20260430-213025.png. English UI. 2026-04-30 21:30 Trap 1, top of rank list (positions 1-4). The top two Trololololele rows OCR with leading noise (`0%$Trololololol#%`, `$Trololololol&e`) so they fuzzy-match at 'likely' rather than 'auto' — that's expected real-world behaviour, not a regression.
